title: Oakay Essentials
description: The official client-side modpack for Oakay, featuring voice chat, performance boosts, and visual enhancements—all fully compatible with the server. Everything will be Oakay! 🌱
body:
**Oakay Essentials** is the official client-side modpack for the Oakay Minecraft server, designed to enhance your gameplay experience while keeping things smooth and immersive. This lightweight pack includes quality-of-life mods like **voice chat, minimaps, performance optimizations, and visual improvements**—all fully compatible with our server.  

Whether you're exploring, building, or connecting with others, Oakay Essentials ensures *everything will be oakay!* 🌱
